major.heading: Search strategy incomplete
major.comment: No grey-literature database was searched and the PRISMA flow omits duplicate record removal.

major.heading: Overreaching recommendation
major.comment: Clinical actionability is asserted but generalizability to community care is unsupported.

major.heading: Agreement statistic without resampling
major.comment: Inter-rater agreement is reported as Cohen's kappa; no bootstrap resampling of the readers was performed.

major.heading: Repeated testing not corrected
major.comment: A permutation test across twelve endpoints with no Bonferroni correction was applied to the readers.

major.heading: Effect measure ignores clustering
major.comment: The odds ratio disregards the intraclass correlation (ICC) induced by repeated readers.
